title: First Year Finnish 1
catalogDescription: Fundamentals of oral and written Finnish, including introductory study of literature, film, and other authentic texts. First in a sequence of three. Maximum 15 credits allowed between FINN 101; FINN 102; FINN 103; and FINN 150. Offered: A.
